name: privacy-screenshot
description: Floating privacy widget for demo screenshots and bug reports: CSS-blur all images/videos + PII, tap-to-blur custom elements, then one-click PNG screenshot (viewport or full page) via html-to-image with extensive fallbacks for broken images and MSE videos.
postInstall: 1. Import styles/privacy.css from your globals.css (or paste the rules in)
2. Mount <PrivacyControls /> once in your DashboardShell or root layout
3. Tag any PII elements with data-pii (emails, usernames, etc.)
4. Tag elements that should NEVER blur with data-no-blur (logos, UI chrome)
5. Tag elements that should be excluded from the screenshot entirely with data-screenshot-hide="1"
6. The image-proxy route lets the screenshot capture cross-origin images that would otherwise taint the canvas — drop it if you don't need external image capture

7. SECURITY: the image-proxy route MUST be gated behind auth. Uncomment the getSession() block at the top of GET (wire it to your auth helper) before shipping, or the route is an open SSRF/proxy endpoint.
